docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $507.88 FILED BY MOLINA, MYRIAM AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO PATRICK DOMINGO RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-23-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-09-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-28-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. DEFT TO PAY PLFT $507.88 + $27 COSTS. DEFT TO PAY PLFT $100 PER MONTH BEGINNING 9/17/01. PAYMENTS ARE DUE BY 17TH OF EACH MONTH. IF NO APPEARANCES ON 2/28/02, CASE DISM W/ PREJ.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLINA, MYRIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGO, PATRICK $457.38 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $484.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
